name: ECOM OS V3 Listing Pipeline Draft V1
purpose: Telegram -> local/server controlled listing pipeline orchestration. No live eBay action without gates.

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.description: Receives Russian text, voice, URL, or photos from operator.

nodes.name: Route Classifier
nodes.description: Classifies intent: create listing draft, preview, rework photos, title, stop, cleanup audit.

nodes.name: URL Intake Agent
nodes.description: Creates source packet from URL/screenshot/photo input.

nodes.name: Local/Server Sandbox Runner
nodes.description: Runs Product Passport, Evidence, Photo Blueprint, Title, Specifics, HTML, Critic, Teacher.

nodes.name: Telegram Preview Packet
nodes.description: Sends Russian preview packet to operator.

nodes.name: Operator Approval Gate
nodes.description: Records approve/reject/rework. No live action here.

nodes.name: eBay Dry Run Payload Builder
nodes.description: Builds payload file only; does not call eBay.

nodes.name: STOP Before Live Gate
nodes.description: Stops before any real eBay publish/revise/delete.

hard_rules: n8n is orchestration only, not source of truth.
No eBay live action in this draft.
Critic PASS required before Telegram approval packet.
Operator approval required before dry-run payload is promoted to live gate.
Live gate must be separate and explicit.
